---
name: 💡 Tool request
about: Suggest a new tool for 100tools
title: '[Tool] '
labels: ['tool-request']
assignees: []
---

## What should the tool do?

One sentence — the tagline you'd put on the tool's homepage card.

## Category

Pick one:

- [ ] Text
- [ ] Developer
- [ ] Image
- [ ] PDF
- [ ] Converter
- [ ] SEO
- [ ] Color
- [ ] Math
- [ ] Time
- [ ] Other:

## Typical input

What does a user paste, type, or drop in?

```
example input
```

## Expected output

What do they get back?

```
example output
```

## Reference tools (optional)

Links to existing tools that do something similar, so we can see what to imitate or improve on.

## Why does this matter?

What workflow does this unblock? Who would use it daily?

## Should it run client-side?

100tools tools run in the browser by default. If this tool **requires** a server (e.g. fetches a remote URL), please explain why and what's processed where.

- [ ] Client-side is fine
- [ ] Needs a server — reason:
